name: SIYI Technology
notes: Shenzhen. ZR10 (10x), ZR30 (30x), ZT30 (30x+thermal+LRF), A8 mini (6x digital only).

name: Viewpro
notes: Shenzhen. OEM/ODM since 2005. Q10N/Z10F (10x), A20KT (20x), Q30T Pro II (30x), Q40TIR (40x).

name: Gremsy
notes: Ho Chi Minh City. Zio (20x), Vio (20x+thermal+LRF), Orus L (25x). NDAA compliant.

name: DJI
notes: Shenzhen. Zenmuse H20 (23x), H30 (34x). DJI-only compatible.

name: Foxtech
notes: Tianjin. EH26 (26x), EH30-M (30x), SEEKER 40x, EH20 (20x).

name: Topotek
notes: China. OEM/ODM. 10x-40x optical zoom gimbals.

name: Yangda
notes: Shenzhen. Sky Eye (30x,40x), Storm Eye (20x-40x+thermal). Also makes VTOL drones.

name: Zingto
notes: Shijiazhuang, Hebei. INYYO brand. Q350 (30x), Q102 (10x), Q12L (10x/40x hybrid).

name: JOUAV
notes: Chengdu. Public (Shanghai STAR Market). MG-120E (30x+thermal+LRF). Primarily VTOL drone maker.

name: GWD Bio-intelligence
notes: Shenzhen. OEM. A30TR (30x), A40 Pro (40x), Z36T (36x), Q10T (10x).

name: Controp
notes: Israel. Defense. STAMP family, FOX 450Z (22.5x continuous zoom).

name: Trillium Engineering
notes: Hood River, OR. HD40 (30x), HD40-LVV (180x), HD25 (3x near-miss). Military/defense.

name: NextVision
notes: Israel. Public (TASE: NXSN). X80 series: 80x optical zoom in 145g. Micro-gimbals 140g-2kg.

name: Edge Autonomy
notes: San Luis Obispo, CA. Acquired by Redwire mid-2025. E180 (30x), E140ZG2 (5x near-miss). Brand retired Jan 2026.

name: UkrSpecSystems
notes: Ukraine. USG-231 (30x), USG-261 (10x, 400g).

name: Trakka Systems
notes: Melbourne, AU. TC-300 (50x). BUT ~19kg — far exceeds weight criteria.

name: Viewsheen
notes: Hangzhou. OEM/ODM. 3.5x to 100x optical zoom modules and complete gimbals.

name: SPI Corp
notes: Las Vegas, NV. M2-D has only 6.6x optical zoom (near-miss). Ultra-lightweight 160g.

name: UXV Technologies
notes: Copenhagen, DK. Optroxa GMB-450: 18x optical, 450g, LWIR+LRF. IP67. Shipping since Sep 2025.

name: Skydroid
notes: Quanzhou. C20 (22x optical zoom). Primarily RC controllers.

name: Xingkai Technology
notes: Shenzhen. XK-F510rs (20x), XK-FG100 (10x).

name: CZI
notes: Guangzhou. C30N (30x+thermal+LRF). DJI M300/M350 compatible.

name: Aero Sentinel
notes: Petah Tikva, IL. Snunit (180g, x26 zoom), Dror (115g). Military. Tightly integrated with own drones.

name: CUAV
notes: Guangzhou. Q10F is Viewpro OEM rebrand. Not a gimbal manufacturer.

name: Autel Robotics
notes: Shenzhen (US office Bothell, WA). DG-L35T (35x) sold separately for Alpha/Titan. EVO Max 4T (10x integrated).
